user.title: Connect to Converging Systems e-Node
user.description:
Enter the network settings for your e-Node gateway.

**Tip:** Use a static IP so the address never changes. Default Telnet port is 23.

data.name: Gateway Name (optional)
data.manual_nodes: Manual ZGN Nodes (fallback if DISCOVER finds nothing)

data_description.host: The IP address of your e-Node on the local network
data_description.manual_nodes: Used when DISCOVER returns 0 devices. Format: RANGE[:bus[:colorspace[:cct[:warm_K[:cool_K]]]]]. Bus: D=DALI (default), X=DMX, I=CS-Bus. Colorspace: MONO (default), HSV. CCT: 0/1. Examples: '1.16.1-14' (DALI mono), '2.1.1-8:X:HSV' (DMX full-colour), '2.1.9-12:X:MONO:1:2700:6500' (DMX tunable-white). Tokens are space or comma separated.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the e-Node. Check the IP address, port, and that the device is powered on.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check your Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This e-Node gateway is already configured.

data.manual_nodes: Manual ZGN Nodes (fallback if DISCOVER finds nothing)
